2026-03-27.patch_summary: This patch renames two io_uring APIs: `io_buffer_register_bvec()` and `io_buffer_unregister_bvec()`, to more generic names `io_buffer_register_request()` and `io_buffer_unregister()`. The renaming is done in preparation for supporting kernel-populated buffers in fuse io-uring, where the new function names will be used directly. The patch also updates documentation and code accordingly.
